next_steps: Thyroid function tests (TSH, free T4, total T3)
Thyroid ultrasound with Doppler flow evaluation
Repeat Interferon-gamma release assay (IGRA) or tuberculin skin test
Thyroid radioactive iodine uptake scan (if thyrotoxicosis is confirmed and subacute thyroiditis is suspected)
Consider fine-needle aspiration of the thyroid nodule if ultrasound suggests malignancy
